review_text: As repeat customers, we booked 17nights in our water view, self contained cabin and could not fault any aspect of our stay. Close to shows, shopping and the staff were very helpful. Definitely will be back.

We had the pleasure of staying for 2 weeks in cabin 18A which was a comfortable 2 bed style with a very usable wrap around deck that we were able use by following the shade as the day progressed.
Plenty of walks along the river and easy access to services in the local area.
The cabin itself was clean and well set up for longer stays.

Love this cabin we recently stayed at. Very clean and comfortable, staff very friendly and happy to help if needed. Price was excellent, we had everything we needed during our stay. Definitely recommend to our family and friends.

Lorraine
Lovely little community here. Amazing amenities and even see little lizard friends 🦎

Great location next to the river. Very quiet. Spent a month in a Kingfisher cabin. The park's greatest asset is their manager, Belinda Lance, who is prepared to go above and beyond. We will definitely be back.

Very happy with our studio cabin and cleaniness. The cabin had everthing we wanted. Staff were very friendly and welcoming. Price was excellent.. Except for flight path, park was very quiet. Would recommend the park to our friends and family.

We stayed 2 Night/s in a TUCKEROO STUDIO, it was clean and all had the facilities you needed. Bed was very comfortable ( I normally sleep on a water bed).
We were close to where we were going to for a show so a big plus.
Plane noise was there due to airport near but all good when it matted as flights stop at night.
We had a very good stay and will be back
Great spot to do whatever you please, close proximity to whatever you need or want
We stayed here for 3 nights was very nice we had a powered site used the pool and bbq facilities nice camp kitchen would stay again

Great place to stay, amenties spotless, and they put on a great Aussie Day BBQ which was attended by many. We have booked for Easter aswell 🙃 staff are great too, great pesk and non peak rates, no rates gouging at this park either.

Great location for a family of four in water front cabin. Very helpful staff and  clean facilities. Close to all Gold Coast and Tweed Heads attractions and beaches.. Children loved the pool and  being able to go fishing off the river bank in front of the cabin. thanks for a lovely stay.
Very clean and quiet place and close to river. Easy to go fishing and running.|Nice and new cabin, it is suitable for a couple.

We had a water front ensuite site, best spot in the park.
The ensuite needs ventilation very hot in summer.
Although occasionally we were in the flight path the location, accessibility for push bike use and bus certainly made our stay amazing 😃
Since the new manager took over, Belinda has gone above and beyond…Recommendations… Professional….Belinda will bring her own personal touch to residents and renters in the park.

Vi var 2 dage på dette campsite og var overordnet godt tilfredse. Super super sødt og hjælpsomt personale. Vi havde problemer med at finde et campsite, grundet højsæson i dette område, men receptionisten i telefonen var så sød, da vi ringede over flere omgange og da vi informerede om at vi kom med kort varsel (inden for 1 time) var dette intet problem! Lidt dyrt, men billigt ift. resten i området grundet school holiday i Australien.
Rigtig fin pool, god størrelse, ikke så mange stole / liggestole, men gæsterne var søde til at dele og personalet hjalp også her.
Toiletterne er lidt gamle og man skal bruge nøgle, som man får udleveret ved ankomst. Kunne godt bruge en kærlig hånd og en kodelås.
Derudover er dette en campsite, hvor mange af gæsterne bor der over lang tid, hvilket er okay da de fleste af beboerne var søde og venlige, dog var vi nok lidt uheldige og bo op af 2 kvinder, som boede mildeste talt som på en losseplads. 3 telte var slået op, kufferter, poser, mad, ting, tøj, mm. Lå spredt udover det hele og de fyldte mere deres Campsite. De havde så mange ting, at det nærmest flød over i vores Camp. Derudover lugtede der af Hash fra deres telt.
Personalet gik den ene dag rundt og ønskede glædelig jul, hvor jeg tænker en påtale af dette til de 2 kvinder, havde været på sin plads. Vi er ikke sarte, men dette er uacceptabelt og især hvis det nu havde været en børnefamilie.
God placering ud til floden og kort afstand til de nærliggende kystbyer.
Billede af udsigten fra poolen samt den beskidte Camp.
The cabin we stayed in was very clean & tidy, the staff were lovey & the park was quiet - the bed was very soft and a bit uncomfortable but all round it was a great experience.

From the first phone call, very good service. Easy booking over the phone.|We had an ensuite site E1 at the front of the Caravan Park. Excellent site overlooking the Tweed River, ensuite was very clean and a very good size. Very good shower, plenty of hot water.|Very easy to drive on and drive off site.|Good on site laundry,|Close to major shopping centre and local cafes.|We had a very good stay and will be back
Manager Belinda was very kind to check us in after hours. The facilities were very good, we had a great experience and would recommend it!

Stayed here several times now. Fantastic location & super clean amenities.Camp kitchen is the cleanest & one of the nicest I’ve seen in my travels  Swimming pool is awesome which overlooks the river. Staff very friendly. Will be staying here again.
Highly recommend, we checked in late/after hours and staff was very professional and went out of their way to help.

I spent 4 nights in the Riverview Cabin (2 Bedroom). The place is beautiful with a great view, and everything was very clean. The only small thing is that the hot water for the kitchen sink takes a bit of time to heat up, but it wasn’t a big issue. There were just two of us, and the cabin was very comfortable and convenient. I would definitely stay here again.
Great little cabin with a lovely view.  Everything was clean and tidy.  Belinda was very helpful with a small issue we had with the electricity.

Un Acceuil au dessus des attentes !!! Milles merci pour votre gentillesse !! Les douches et partie commune sont propres. L’aéroport à proximité peu faire peur mais il n’y a aucun vol de nuit . Nous avons dormi comme des bébé. . Je recommande à 100%

Booked this because of proximity to friends. I was lucky enough to get a water view cabin 23a.. amazing. Staff were beautiful, funny and friendly. I arrived early and was able to check in straight away. Decorated in coastal theme, absolutely spotless. Bed so comfortable. (Sleeps four). I feel so excited to tell everyone about it. Will definately visit again!

We enjoyed our stay in our cabin it had the novelty of being away from home with the feeling of being home.
Everything was perfect we will be looking forward to visiting again.
Very good location service and park.
Great little park.. clean and close to everything...

We had our daughter’s wedding venue just up the road so there were quite a few cabins booked by friends and family. |It was easy to communicate with Paula and her team, either on the phone or via email in the lead up to the wedding and they made checking in for everyone a breeze as we all arrived.|The park is well maintained and looks very nice. I went into 4 cabins other than the one I was staying in and they were all different which was nice (they had personality). All were very clean and had the amenities which make life easier when staying away from home.|Would definitely recommend this park and the lovely staff.
Nice place to stay for a few days away down the Coast.
Great service especially from Sharon at reception 👏 kept us well informed about our stay times and what was happening on arrival and departure. Very tidy room and very clean holiday park

We just had 3 nights in a cabin. First I have to say the receptionist, Sharon was so obliging and friendly.  The cabins are second to none,  clean, very tastefully decorated and really comfortable.  Everything you need is there for a great stay. The location is perfect for access to Tweed, 5 minutes from everywhere. I can't recommend it more highly.
It was a Studio , not for couple very small . Not good

I am a bit torn about this review. This park is in a great location and so peaceful opposite the river. There are clearly a lot of permanent residents which is fine as they were all very friendly. We were on the very front site which was good and bad. Great in that we could sit out & enjoy the view & Sun but bad in that we were right near the exit so saw everyone coming & going & the ensuite  was right near the road so when I came out people would be walking  past etc. we enjoyed our stay & would probably stay again
Great spot, but plane's a bit noisy through the day.

Great place to stay. I stayed short term for approximately 3 months and thoroughly enjoyed my time there. The people are great and Paula was the most amazing manager. A manager that really cares about your human side. Thank you Paula and team for making my stay a great one
We spent an enjoyable few days at the Tweed Colonial Holiday Park.  Central location and a lovely view if the Tweed River.  I would highly recommend it.
Great location close to shops and Clubs. Friendly welcoming staff. Quite location great double slab site. All amenities very clean and tidy.
Absolutely amazing place. The staff are extremely friendly and always there for you. Great location and extremely clean place.
Lovely stay... park is very clean, tidy and well equipped, peaceful. Excellent value for money .. really enjoyed the brand of shower toiletries.. smelled lovely.
Always friendly and helpful, lovely clean well equipped cottage, great position with river views. Highly recommend.

What a wonderful place to stay, quiet, clean and welcoming. The water outlook is just beautiful in the early morning. Our son’s family has grown so we now need to stay off site and the cabin at Colonial Tweed Holiday and Home Park is just around the corner from his home.  It provided us with a great place to escape the grandchildren when we needed to, but also close enough that we could wander over for a visit easily.
Caravan sites are small, not many of them.  Amenities are clean. This park is more of a permanent resident type village. Airport is close so it is quite noisy with airplane traffic.

This park was the cleanest I’ve seen. I am a clean freak and could not fault. Toilets, showers, pool, camp kitchen were spotless. It’s on the river and off to a quiet street. You do get a few planes from Coolangatta airport during the day (none at night. They didn’t bother us at all. Would recommend to anyone.

Julie
Great place to stay.. they accommodated us, even though we didn't have a booking

We recently stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin, I was impressed at the interior design it felt like a little home and the beds were comfortable. The whole park was clean and well looked after and a great location

My parents stayed here travelling from Sydney to Brisbane in their motorhome. Among all the sites they've stayed at, this is the best so far. Friendly, clean, comfortable and fantastic location. More peaceful than the bigger more commercial holiday parks.

Very clean, tidy and peaceful park.  Great location for everything.
Cabin was clean, very comfortable and well appointed.
Very easy and quick check in and check out.
The park is in close proximity to the Gold Coast airport, but the flights going overhead did not bother us.
Highly Recommend this Park.
Cabin was very clean and comfortable. Had everything we needed for our week stay Great location to all our needs
Can't fault my stay here. The Kingfisher Cabin was an absolute treat to stay in. Very clean & modern  loved it & will be back for sure.
We were there for 3 nights. Very quiet, very clean and the bed was amazing!!

Booked a room last week for this weekend from their official website, website said gateway error. But money was deducted already. Called the bank and bank confirmed it went through. Call the hotel, hotel said never received. I said don’t worry. I can sort out with bank. Please just book another room for me and I don’t mind to pay again. Then stuff said: I am not happy and we will never have any rooms available for you. So I called the bank and the bank is getting it back for me. And I booked somewhere else. Now this morning the stuff called me this morning and said have rooms this weekend available for me. This is inhuman and ridiculous. Can’t believe they can act in this way.

Spent 2 days 3/02/24 - 5/02/24.Firstly as we walked up to the veranda it was covered in leaves dirt cobwebs , spiders , ants even in the bathroom.The entry doors were dirty the Out side table had to be washed down before we could sit there  On entering it wasnt the cabin we booked .It was smaller .There was dirt and dust , cobwebs on the bedroom wall next to the bedside table.same next to the walls in the lounge room .We couldnt use our bbq because it was putrid , so I called them and left a message could they please come clean it  but no one got back to us at all.Directly across from us there was people living in there car who were walking in through our gate to enter the park we didnt have the river veiw at all because all we could see was them . When we were leaving I went to empty out the bin in the bathroom and when I moved it away from the wall thete was a pile dust and old pubic hairs from who ever had stayed there previously it looked all clean on the surfous but it was disgusting .We had to clean everything again .So thanks for everything ,but wont be back .The fridge , shower , and bed were cleaned properly .

Nice central spot to visit local beaches and shops. Easy access to Kingscliff too. Planes overhead a bit noisy but got used to them. We had the cabin at the front which didnt feel like we were in a caravan park, it had water views, was very clean, with airconditioner as well as fans.

Friendly customer service, location was close to everything without being too close. Clean amenities and pool.  Pool was relaxing, our kids enjoyed the pool alot. Child friendly. Park has residents living there who are kind and friendly. Well priced considering peak holiday time. Just what we needed. Perfect position for a stroll along Tweed River as well.
Over and above service. Beautiful caring staff and accommodation. Would more than highly recommend

We had a family wedding just up the road from here so Colonial Tweed holiday park was perfect for all of us. Paula, the park manager was very welcoming and extremely helpful .we will definitely stay here again

Lady at reception was very helpful and friendly, the cabin was great,clean and the bed very comfortable.Also a quiet area, with no traffic noise. There's also a big swimming pool. We'll be back If we travel through this area again .
Great spot to stay. Immaculately clean, safe and amenities and facilities are great.
Very friendly and helpful staff. Cabins  clean and comfortable. Great location overlooking Teranora Creek. We're coming back next year.

Love staying in the Riverview cabins. The cabins had also been renovated since the last time we stayed and they look amazing and also a code only access to drive in and out with a boom gate. Can't wait to go again.
We had a new cabin. It was wonderful. Even turned on heater for our late arrival. Staff go above and beyond and really care for the guests from booking to stay. Thank you
